version_description: From live version from ellen show, he plays different chord progression. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0OXjCR3Uu0A.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
From ellens serenade video (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0OXjCR3Uu0A)

Chords from the video:

[ch]Em[/ch] (X-7-5-0-7-0)
[ch]D[/ch] (X-5-4-0-0-0)
[ch]C[/ch] (X-3-2-0-0-0)
[ch]D[/ch] (X-5-4-0-0-0)

Of course you can play basic Em-D-C-D chords too!

Strumming pattern is just basic muted strum down with your nail. You can try do as on the video.


[Chorus]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah, you got that yummy-yum[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
That yummy-yum, that yummy-yummy[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, babe, yeah, babe, yeah, babe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
Any night, any day[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, babe, yeah, babe, yeah, babe[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
In the mornin' or the late[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Say the word, on my way[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Bona fide stallion[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
Ain't in no stable, no, you stay on the run[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Ain't on the side, you're number one[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah, every time I come around, you get it done (You get it done)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]
Fifty-fifty, love the way you split it[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]C[/ch]
Hundred racks, help me spend it, babe[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Light a match, get litty, babe[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
That jet set, watch the sunset kinda, yeah, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
Rollin' eyes back in my head, make my toes curl, yeah, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
